title: luzula nivea var. angustata
intro: Luzula nivea var. angustata, also known as narrow-leaved snow grass or narrow-leaved woodrush, is a plant species belonging to the family Juncaceae. It is used for its medicinal properties, particularly as a diuretic and expectorant, helping to relieve respiratory issues and promote urination. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, relieving congestion, and soothing coughs, making it a valuable remedy for respiratory conditions such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Luzula nivea var. angustata is often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential uses and effects.
